title: neochilenia malleolata
intro: Neochilenia malleolata, also known as the Chilean mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. Neochilenia malleolata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other medicinal plants in traditional medicine.
